findings.title: Attack surface summary
findings.detail:
groups: open=0, allowlist=4
tools.elevated: enabled
hooks.webhooks: disabled
hooks.internal: enabled
browser control: enabled
trust model: personal assistant (one trusted operator boundary), not hostile multi-tenant on one shared gateway

findings.title: Reverse proxy headers are not trusted
findings.detail: gateway.bind is loopback and gateway.trustedProxies is empty. If you expose the Control UI through a reverse proxy, configure trusted proxies so local-client checks cannot be spoofed.
findings.remediation: Set gateway.trustedProxies to your proxy IPs or keep the Control UI local-only.

findings.title: Elevated exec allowlist contains wildcard
findings.detail: tools.elevated.allowFrom.webchat includes "*" which effectively approves everyone on that channel for elevated mode.

findings.title: Exec security=full is configured
findings.detail: Full exec trust is enabled for: main, hager.
findings.remediation: Prefer tools.exec.security="allowlist" with ask prompts, and reserve "full" for tightly scoped break-glass agents only.
